title: Smederevo, Podunavlje — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Smederevo, Podunavlje: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Smederevo is a city in Podunavlje with a population of 64,000. A city on the Danube in eastern Serbia, home to the largest medieval fortress in Serbia and a major steel manufacturing center.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
